For others with the same name, see Aegon Targaryen.

Prince Aegon Targaryen was the youngest child of Prince Baelon Targaryen and Princess Alyssa Targaryen. He was named after Aegon the Conqueror.[1] His older brothers were King Viserys I and Prince Daemon Targaryen.[2]

History[ ]

Alyssa never recovered from the difficult labor, and perished the same year of Aegon's birth. Aegon died the following year, just short of his first nameday.[1]
